description_long: This is a rectangular, in-ground jacuzzi with a modern, minimalist design, featuring clean, straight edges and a smooth, light gray exterior. The interior is filled with clear blue water, and one end of the jacuzzi contains a set of built-in steps for easy entry and exit. The steps are integrated into the structure and appear to be made of the same material as the main body. The water level is high, nearly reaching the top edge of the jacuzzi, giving it a ready-to-use appearance. No visible jets, control panels, or covers are present on the exterior or interior surfaces. The overall look is sleek and functional, suitable for placement in urban outdoor spaces such as patios, parks, or luxury residential areas.
description: A modern rectangular jacuzzi with a light gray exterior, built-in steps at one end, and filled with clear blue water. The design is sleek and minimalist, with no visible jets or control panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow end of the jacuzzi with the water surface visible and the steps partially seen on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the jacuzzi, with the built-in steps clearly visible at the far right end.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the opposite narrow end, with the water surface and the steps now on the right side, partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length of the jacuzzi, with the steps at the left end and the rest of the interior unobstructed.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water level close to the top edge
